title: Foreign Relations of the United States, 1969-1976, Volume XXVII, Iran; Iraq, 1973-1976
source_org: US Department of State, Office of the Historian
notes: Editor: Monica L. Belmonte; General Editor: Edward C. Keefer; US GPO, Washington, 2012. Iran documents 1-202 (Jan 1973-Jan 1977): January-August 1973 (Docs 1-34); September 1973-November 1974 (Docs 35-90, post-oil-shock era); December 1974-November 1975 (Docs 91-149); December 1975-January 1977 (Docs 150-202). Iraq documents 203-325 follow. Includes a 'Note on U.S. Covert Actions'. This is the peak-oil-boom Pahlavi era (Shah's arms buildup and development spending funded by the 1973 oil price shock) -- directly complements the CIA 'Shah's Economy' 1974 memo already downloaded. Straightforward curl download, no bot-gating.
